meta.next_milestone: Phase 8 — paper-trading observation window + Stripe webhook secret resolution
recent_milestones: 2026-05-02 — Pi4b auditor.db deep-dive: 16 unresolved findings driven to 0. Three new bugs found + fixed: (1) exit_performance INSERT was missing NOT NULL exit_timestamp — caused every position close to roll back; (2) company_auditor cascaded SERVICE_DOWN for every configured service when SSH itself failed — fix is a pre-flight ping that early-returns when the node is unreachable, leaving NODE_UNREACHABLE as the single connectivity finding; (3) _ssh_run gained a 2-retry policy with 3s delay so auditor's 5-min cron no longer trips on the pi5-boot window. Same-day pi5 deep-dive earlier surfaced and fixed: (4) the 422 POST /v2/orders storm — fractional shares + trailing_stop is unsupported on Alpaca paper, new _submit_trail_stop_if_whole() helper replaces 3 identical call sites; gate10's internal trail-stop ratchet handles exits for fractional positions; (5) AlpacaClient._request now captures response body on 4xx errors so future Alpaca rejections show the actual reason; (6) Boot Watchdog/Portal settle window 15s→120s for pi5's cold-boot path; (7) Ghost positions at boot demoted ERROR→WARNING (trader's gate0 auto-resolves on next market-open cycle).

2026-04-27 → 2026-05-02 — Six-day consolidated work summary. 137 commits on synthos + 35 on synthos-company. Major themes: (a) 11-Agent audit pass complete (Trader, News, Sentiment, Screener, Fault, Bias, Macro, Market State, Validator) — Round 9 hot-fix closed cross-customer fault leakage, VIX migrated from Yahoo to FRED, per-customer code suffixes on validator/bias/screener admin alerts, sentiment Stage-4 G24 temporal persistence. (b) Scoop notification pipeline rebuilt — diagnosed three structural bugs (schema mismatch, one-shot drain, dead-end portal-dispatch auth), built agents/_shared_scoop.py as single enqueue source of truth, made drain re-pollable + dual-schema; portal-dispatch service-token auth now lit up. (c) EDGAR ingestion: Stages 1-4 enabled with Form 4 + 8-K + 13D + Form 144 + 13G + cross-source dedup; 12-activist registry seeded; SEC user-agent configured; live verification confirmed real signal flow. (d) Request Access public flow shipped — landing-page button → form → cross-node admin notification → approval handler routes through /setup-account email flow for unauthenticated users without an access code. (e) Audit-page deep-dive over two days: noise floor 6,729 → 0 unresolved findings via four IGNORE patterns + customer-key-invalid auto-skip + duplicate-column-name PRAGMA pre-check + 422 fractional-shares fix + auditor SSH retry/ping. (f) Trader 4-day halt loop diagnosed and fixed — gate1 sys.exit before AGENT_COMPLETE write meant fault detector saw stale heartbeats, validator emitted NO_GO, trader halted, no fresh AGENT_COMPLETE — self-reinforcing. Two-part fix: trader writes heartbeat + AGENT_COMPLETE before exit; fault detector aggregates per-customer heartbeats. (g) Screener overhaul — 30-day price sparkline, Today's Standouts strip, sector pulse bars, score-band tints, time-horizon chips, drawer receipts, real G2 liquidity floor + G3 momentum scoring, SECTOR_CONFIG SSGA refresh, combined_score 30/30/30/10. (h) Portal UX: Setup Tutorial V2 (8-step modal Welcome → Alpaca → keys), About-this-page drawer system, drawer pills + screener hero badges (Phases E/F), pill-usage telemetry (Phase G), agent-detail drawer (Phase H), per-ticker company logos, customer activity report. (i) System architecture page rebuilt — pipeline tab matches code reality (gate counts corrected, foreign data sources annotated, deferred-data-sources panel for paid-tier roadmap, click-to-detail wired). (j) Stale-branch + server cleanup: synthos 41→3 branches, synthos-company 10→1; pi4b dead systemd units + cancelled-project clones removed; login_server archived. (k) Database hygiene: D-rows orphan cleanup (~58k rows), news_feed write-time dedup + UNIQUE index, route shared market intel to user/signals.db, lazy migrations now PRAGMA-pre-checked.

2026-05-01 late PM — Request Access public flow shipped + cleanup batch deployed (operator authorized override of market-hours rule for this set since none was trading-critical). New public /request-access route on pi5 retail portal lets prospective users without an access code submit name/email/phone/why-interested/how-heard; cross-node POST to pi4b /api/enqueue queues admin notification through the rebuilt scoop pipeline; admin reviews on pi4b approvals page (now shows Type pill + why/how detail); approve creates customer with email_verified=0 and routes a /setup-account link via Resend so customer can finalize. Five smaller items shipped in the same deploy: A portal-dispatch service-token auth (lights up scoop in-app notifications via PORTAL_TOKEN=MONITOR_TOKEN on pi4b; scoop now shows 'auth=service-token' at startup), F news-agent duplicate flag writes fixed (write_news_flag SELECT-then-INSERT for non-null source_signal_id), G TICKER_ALIASES grown 32→43 entries from observed pi5 reject patterns (TSLA gets executive/product variants, plus 11 net-new tickers including IHRT/SNDK/FIVN/VEEV from wrong_ticker remaps), H get_watching_signals legacy function removed (validate_02 updated), I check_email.html rebuilt with SVG envelope and SYNTHOS visual language. Three hot-fixes caught during live smoke: missing public_routes allowlist entry, X-Token vs Bearer auth mismatch on cross-node call, em-dash latin-1 encoding break in Resend Idempotency-Key. Smoke verified: form, DB, email delivery, approve flow, customer record correctness — all green; smoke artifacts cleaned.

2026-05-01 PM — Scoop notification pipeline rebuilt: diagnosed three structural bugs (schema mismatch between strongbox/scoop, one-shot drain at startup, dead-end portal-dispatch auth) that had been silently swallowing every admin alert since 2026-04-28. Built agents/_shared_scoop.py as single enqueue source of truth; refactored strongbox + sentinel writers; removed vault dead code; made scoop's trigger drain re-pollable + dual-schema. Triple-check: 5 phases passed, 3 real emails delivered. Same session: EDGAR ingestion enabled on pi5 (SEC user-agent + EDGAR_ALL_ENABLED=true; 12-activist registry seeded), stale-branch sweep across both repos (synthos 41→3, synthos-company 10→1), pi4b server cleanup (dead systemd units + cancelled-project clones). System-architecture pipeline page accuracy fix (corrected macro gate ordering, removed bias scaffolding flags) + new deferred-data-sources panel for paid-tier roadmap visibility (StockTwits, options chain, ICE BofA credit, FMP holdings, etc.).

2026-05-01 — 11-Agent audit pass complete (Trader, News, Sentiment, Screener, Fault, Bias, Macro, Market State, Validator). Round 9 hot-fix `7d1dd04` closed cross-customer fault-leakage (validator NO_GO on customer A no longer caused by customer B's Alpaca 401). VIX migrated from Yahoo to FRED VIXCLS with ATR fallback (`32a7d19`). Per-customer code suffixes (`_<short_id>`) on validator/bias/screener admin alerts via shared `emit_admin_alert()` with 12h dedup. System-architecture pipeline page rewritten: gate counts corrected to match code (Fault 4→8, Market State 5→4, Trader 14→13), foreign data sources annotated (FRED, Alpaca, Yahoo, News APIs), scaffolding gates flagged in amber, click-to-detail wired on every gate + agent header, Sector Screener restyled to match the other ingest agents.

2026-04-27 — Trader-visibility audit: verified Gate 5 actually consumes every screener-derived input. Three changes landed. (1) sector_screener.combined_score re-weighted 40/40/0/20 → 30/30/30/10 so momentum is included in candidate ranking (was being computed but never reaching the rank). (2) ret_3m raw 3-month return now persisted on sector_screening + surfaced on portal screener page + planning drawer. (3) Trader Gate 5 emits a single consolidated decision_log entry per evaluation containing every screener field considered (sector, combined, news, sentiment, momentum, ret_3m, congressional, screener_adj, screener_stamp_adj) — visibility-only, zero behavior change. Bonus: documented intentional sentiment dual-write in retail_market_sentiment_agent.py (sector_screening.sentiment_score per-ticker for screener display + signals.sentiment_score per-signal for trader Gate 5 — same detect_cascade output, two cardinalities).

2026-04-27 — Earlier same day: MRVL trail-stop -491% display bug, settlement-lag race in Gate 0 orphan adoption, rotation-at-loss reversed (winners-only), BIL excluded from Gate 10, CBOE put_call_ratio caching + None-safe formatting (had been pinning every screener-sentiment fulfilment to 0.5 since CBOE Cloudflare block), customer-activity report engine on cmd portal /customer-activity, P&L report polish (total-from-zero, sign rendering, long-term, cross-account).

2026-04-24/25 — Pre-launch security audit closed 2 CRITICAL + 2 HIGH customer→admin escalation paths; added /reset-password handler; persistent login rate limiter (login_attempts table); two-step verify-new-email flow; Phase 4.5 file-upload audit 21/21 pass.

2026-04-25 — Attribution patch enforcement: TICKER_REMAP + TICKER_REJECT flipped True after 4.5-day shadow review. News-agent shadow data: 41% no_match noise, 33% wrong-ticker remaps, 13% of remaps reaching VALIDATED+.

2026-04-25 — Customer Dashboard UX overhaul (~20 commits, Phase 5„7L). Sparklines, four specialized slide-out drawers (Position / History / Approval / Planning), Signal Trust widget replacing internal-score leak, lock chip + bot status light, news + watchlist page redesigns, /api/ticker-news + /api/ticker-context endpoints, watchlist wiring fix (was reading news_feed instead of signals table). Net diff across 11 phase commits: ~2,700 lines changed, 4 dead-code paths removed, 8 punch-list cleanups.
